name: inkstone
description: Custom Claude Code skills by Augustin Chan — ink painting generation, UI/UX design audits, and more
author: Augustin Chan

skills.name: create-explanation
skills.description: Generate a scholarly bilingual explanation of a classical Chinese verse. Use when the user pastes a classical Chinese verse and wants to understand it, asks 'what does this mean,' or wants an English and Traditional Chinese commentary.

skills.name: verse-to-prompt
skills.description: Generate a Chinese ink painting image prompt from a classical Chinese verse. Use when the user pastes a classical Chinese verse and asks for an image prompt, wants to visualize a verse, or asks 'what would this look like as an ink painting.'

skills.name: ui-ux-architect
skills.description: Use when auditing UI/UX design, reviewing screen layouts, evaluating user flows, or assessing design system consistency.

skills.name: nextjs-i18n-seo
skills.description: Use when a Next.js multilingual site has crawlability issues, locale URLs aren't indexed, or to audit/fix i18n SEO. Fixes 307 redirect bug, no-prefix default locale, sitemap, hreflang.

skills.name: blakean-scene
skills.description: Convert abstract symbolic concepts into Blakean embodied scenes for image generation. Use when you have an abstract concept (chakra, sephirah, alchemical stage, rune, hexagram, bardo state) and need a scene with figures, gesture, and tension — not a diagram. Encodes Blake's 8 compositional patterns with selection rules.
